UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and application-specific settings, excluding authentication details managed by an external system. This entity differentiates between 'user' and 'admin' account types.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalAuthId.description: Identifier from the external authentication system, linking this user profile to their authentication credentials.

username.description: Unique handle chosen by the user for identification and search.

displayName.description: Non-unique display name chosen by the user.

email.description: User's email address, used for communication and not for authentication within this system.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, determining access levels and permissions (e.g., 'user', 'admin').

isPremium.description: Indicates if the user has an active premium subscription to remove ads.

isPublic.description: Indicates if the user's profile and libraries are visible to other users.

languagePreference.description: User's preferred language for the application interface (e.g., 'en' for English, 'ar' for Arabic).

themePreference.description: User's preferred color theme for the application interface (e.g., 'dark', 'light').

lastUsernameChange.description: Timestamp of the last time the user changed their unique username.

commentRestrictionUntil.description: ISO timestamp until which the user is restricted from commenting.

suspensionUntil.description: ISO timestamp until which the user account is suspended.

watchlistAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has added to their personal watchlist.

currentlyWatchingAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user is currently watching.

favoriteAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has favorited.

completedAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has finished watching.

favoriteEpisodeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Episode entities that the user has favorited.

blockedUserIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for UserProfile entities that this user has blocked.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles, preferences, and watchlist.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores user reports for episodes or comments.

/users/{userId}/history/{historyId}.description: Stores user's watched episodes history. Always private.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notifId}.description: Personal notifications for friend requests, replies, warnings, etc.

/admins/{adminId}.description: Dedicated collection for administrative role assignment.

/anime/{animeId}.description: Stores public information about anime series.
